{{Infobox artifact
| name = Arelius technique library
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Arelius technique library]] is an item [[Eithan]] is bringing back.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Arelius technique library]] is a ball of copper plates.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] dove into the [[Arelius technique library]] to look for information on [[hunger madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
